query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exchangeSchools (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '學校名稱',
  city VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '城市（香港/澳門）',
  address VARCHAR(500) COMMENT '地址',
  contactName VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '聯繫人',
  contactPhone VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '聯繫電話',
  contactEmail VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '聯繫郵箱',
  notes TEXT COMMENT '備註',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS domesticSchools (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL COMMENT '學校名稱',
  address VARCHAR(500) COMMENT '地址',
  studentCount INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '學生人數',
  teacherCount INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '教師人數',
  contactName VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '聯繫人',
  contactPhone VARCHAR(20) COMMENT '聯繫電話',
  contactEmail VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '聯繫郵箱',
  notes TEXT COMMENT '備註',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schoolPairings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  domesticSchoolId INT NOT NULL,
  exchangeSchoolId INT NOT NULL,
  exchangeDate DATE COMMENT '交流日期',
  exchangeCount INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '交流人數',
  notes TEXT COMMENT '備註',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (domesticSchoolId) REFERENCES domesticSchools(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  FOREIGN KEY (exchangeSchoolId) REFERENCES exchangeSchools(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_pairing (domesticSchoolId, exchangeSchoolId)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
